name: @aiforddd/unified-mcp
description: Unified MCP server for DDD for AI Tool Suite

scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/tools/code-manifest/config/templates && cp src/tools/code-manifest/config/templates/* dist/tools/code-manifest/config/templates/ 2>/dev/null || : && mkdir -p dist/prompts && cp -r prompts/* dist/prompts/ 2>/dev/null || : && cp src/tools/code-manifest/config/config.dddclassifier.json dist/tools/code-manifest/config/config.dddclassifier.json 2>/dev/null || :
